messages.content: rewrite: Last episode you guys entered the witchlight carnival, headed towards Lost and found and ran into Dirla the friendlt displacer beast. She mentioned your lost items were not here and that she had also lost something; her cub Star who has gone missing. She also stated the Mr Witch and Mr Light were acting strange. From there you went to the Dragon fly ride where a couple of you saved a blue bearded dwarf from falling off his mount, you also noticed a little kenku flee from the scene, suspecting they may have had something to do with the incident. You thn decided to head to the staff area but not before playing a few games, notably Felix and Jester losing an arm wrestling contetest to a scruwny goblin. And we find you standing infront of the staff area which is surronded by a magical 20ft wall of thorns

In the previous episode, you all ventured into the whimsical witchlight carnival and made your way towards the Lost and Found booth. Unexpectedly, you encountered Dirla, a friendly displacer beast who informed you that your missing items were not present. Dirla also revealed that she had lost something dear to her heart - her cub named Star, who had gone missing as well. Adding to the intrigue, she mentioned that the carnival's owners, Mr. Witch and Mr. Light, were behaving strangely.

Continuing your exploration, you proceeded to the Dragon Fly ride, where a brave few among you managed to save a blue-bearded dwarf from falling off his ride. During this incident, you also noticed a quick-witted kenku fleeing from the scene, leading you to suspect their possible involvement in the mishap.

Motivated by curiosity, you collectively decided to make your way towards the staff area, albeit after indulging in a few carnival games. Notably, Felix and Jester found themselves defeated in an arm wrestling contest against a scrawny goblin.

And so, we find the group now standing before the staff area, which is cunningly protected by a magical 20-foot wall of thorns.
Notably, Felix and Jester embarassed themselves in an arm wrestling contest against a scrawny goblin.

In an entertaining turn of events, Felix and Jester found themselves in an arm wrestling contest against a seemingly weak goblin. Unfortunately, much to their chagrin, they were surprisingly defeated, resulting in an amusing moment of embarrassment for the duo.

You feel the bag start moving.
As you unzip the bag.
As you unzip the bag, you feel a sudden movement from within.
You feel the bag start moving.
The bag you were holding suddenly begins to shift and move on its own.
Curious about the source of the movement, you proceed to unzip the bag.

A small horn protruds from the bag, followed by brown floppy ears and a brown and white stripped grumpy rabbits face. the rabbit hops out of the bag, looks around and spots Tim. The rabbit heads over to Tim and leans against him looking for a pat.

As you unzip the bag, a small horn catches your attention, followed by the emergence of a brown floppy-eared rabbit with a grumpy expression on its face. With a quick hop, the rabbit jumps out of the bag and scans the surroundings until it locks eyes with Tim. Recognizing a potential companion, the rabbit trots over to Tim and leans against him, eagerly seeking a gentle pat.
Recognition crosses over the rabbit's face as it locks eyes with Tim, a hint of familiarity glimmering in its eyes.
As all this happens, you see Jester intrigued by the bag look into the bag and climb into it
While this delightful encounter unfolds, Jester, captivated by the magical bag, cannot resist its allure. Intrigued, Jester peers into the bag, finding it captivating enough to climb right in.
Inside the bag, Jester discovers a spacious interior that can comfortably accommodate two medium-sized humanoids who are willing to enter.
